title: Hemionitis regularis
taxonomy: Hemionitis regularis is a species of fern within the family Blechnaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as water ferns or chain ferns. The genus Hemionitis belongs to the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse order of ferns. Blechnaceae is part of the class Polypodiopsida, which comprises over 12,000 known species of ferns.
